mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST p LEFT JOIN USERS u ON p.CREATED_BY = u.USER_ID WHERE p.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
AND TRUNC(p.CREATED_AT) >= TO_DATE(#{searchDTO.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(p.CREATED_AT) <= TO_DATE(#{searchDTO.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND u.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, p.BOARD_ID AS boardId, p.TITLE AS title, p.CONTENT AS content, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, p.CREATED_BY AS createdBy, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, u.USER_NAME AS userName FROM POST p LEFT JOIN USERS u ON p.CREATED_BY = u.USER_ID WHERE p.BOARD_ID IN ( SELECT BOARD_ID FROM BOARD WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ) ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, p.BOARD_ID AS boardId, p.TITLE AS title, p.CONTENT AS content, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, p.CREATED_BY AS createdBy, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, u.USER_NAME AS userName FROM POST p LEFT JOIN USERS u ON p.CREATED_BY = u.USER_ID WHERE p.BOARD_ID IN ( SELECT BOARD_ID FROM BOARD WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ) ORDER BY NVL(p.VIEW_COUNT, 0) DESC, p.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
